log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration.
→ Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration: CON save [d20:20+8=28 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 19 necrotic damage (half).
--- Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration --- HP: 48/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:7+9=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 3 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
--- Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 15] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 127/135
